meals.name: Homemade Raspberry Chia Jam (per 100g)
meals.recipe: 1.5kg frozen raspberries, 50g chia seeds, 50g agave syrup. Cook raspberries down, mix in chia and agave, let set. Makes ~1600g.

meals.name: Oatmeal Breakfast (full batch, serves 3)
meals.recipe: 90g oats, 1.6 scoops (48g) whey protein, 1 pineapple ring, 30g homemade raspberry jam, 1 banana, 40g kiki puter (peanut butter). Mix and serve.

meals.name: Half-Tortilla Egg Meal (Sneška)
meals.recipe: 2 egg whites, 1 whole egg, 200ml yogurt 1% fat, half tortilla (55g). Designed for Sneška.

meals.name: Pita (whole grain + sitni sir, full batch serves 5)
meals.recipe: 150g whole grain phyllo (kore), 250g Milk House sitni sir (cottage cheese), 2 egg whites, 1 whole egg, 1 tsp sesame seeds. Bake until golden.
